2606.17781.title: MIVE: A Minimalist Integer Vector Engine for Softmax LayerNorm and RMSNorm Acceleration
2606.17781.paper_summary: The rapid growth of Large Language Models (LLMs) has intensified the need for specialized hardware accelerators that can satisfy stringent inference latency and power constraints. Although matrix multiplications dominate the overall computational workload, non-linear vector normalization operations, such as LayerNorm, RMSNorm and Softmax can become critical hardware bottlenecks. Existing accelerators typically implement these functions using dedicated hardware blocks, leading to duplicated resources and inefficient silicon utilization. To address this limitation, we propose a Minimalist Integer Vector Engine (MIVE), a programmable architecture capable of executing all three operations within a unified datapath. By exploiting common computational patterns across LayerNorm, RMSNorm and Softmax the proposed vector engine maximizes hardware sharing while reducing implementation overhead. Physical ASIC implementation results show that MIVE provides comprehensive multi-function support while achieving higher area and hardware efficiency than most state-of-the-art standalone accelerators.
2606.17781.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）的快速增長加劇了對專用硬體加速器的需求，以滿足嚴格的推理延遲和功耗限制。<lb/>雖然矩陣乘法主導了整體計算工作負載，但非線性向量正規化操作，如 LayerNorm、RMSNorm 和 Softmax，可能成為關鍵的硬體瓶頸。<lb/>現有的加速器通常使用專用硬體區塊來實現這些功能，導致資源重複和矽片利用效率低下。<lb/>為了解決這一限制，我們提出了一種極簡整數向量引擎（MIVE），這是一種可編程架構，能夠在統一的數據通路中執行所有三種操作。<lb/>通過利用 LayerNorm、RMSNorm 和 Softmax 之間的共同計算模式，所提出的向量引擎最大化了硬體共享，同時減少了實現開銷。<lb/>實體 ASIC 實現結果顯示，MIVE 提供了全面的多功能支持，同時在面積和硬體效率上超越了大多數最先進的獨立加速器。
2606.17781.author: Kosmas Alexandridis et.al.
